mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_account (display_name, password_hash, icon_path, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{displayName}, #{passwordHash}, #{iconPath}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE player_account SET display_name = #{displayName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE player_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE player_account SET icon_path = #{iconPath}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_account_token (account_id, token, expire_at, created_at, last_used_at) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{token}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), #{lastUsedAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM player_account_token WHERE expire_at < NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE player_account_token SET last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt} WHERE token = #{token}
